L. 114-113) В§ 324** (effective Feb 17, 2016): raised statutory rate from 10 % to 15 % under В§ 1445(a); created tiered structure for buyer-residence transactions: **amount realized вүӨ $300,000 + buyer-residence affidavit = 0 %**; **$300,000 < amount realized вүӨ $1,000,000 + buyer-residence affidavit = 10 %**; **amount realized > $1,000,000 OR no buyer-residence affidavit = 15 %** ([American Expat CPA FIRPTA Withholding Guide 2026](https://americanexpatcpa.com/firpta-withholding/), [IRS Exceptions from FIRPTA Withholding](https://www.irs.gov/individuals/international-taxpayers/exceptions-from-firpta-withholding)). **Twelve-mode severity ladder**: NotApplicableUsTransferor, NotApplicablePubliclyTradedStock, NotApplicableDomesticallyControlledReit, CompliantZeroRateBuyerResidenceUnder300k, CompliantReducedRateBuyerResidence300kTo1m, CompliantFullRateWithholdingApplied, CompliantIrsWithholdingCertificateReducedRate, CompliantIrsWithholdingCertificateZeroRate, ViolationBuyerFailedToWithholdFromForeignTransferor, ViolationBuyerResidenceAffidavitFraudulent, ViolationBuyerWithheldLessThanStatutoryRate, ViolationForm8288NotFiledWithin20Days. **Four property types**: DirectUsRealPropertyInterest, InterestInDomesticCorporationRegularlyTradedStock, InterestInDomesticallyControlledReit, InterestInPrivatelyHeldUsRealPropertyHoldingCorporation. **Three buyer-residence intent states**: NoBuyerResidenceAffidavit, BuyerResidenceAffidavitWithGenuinePlans, BuyerResidenceAffidavitFraudulent. **Four withholding-certificate states**: NoneFiled, IssuedReducedRate, IssuedZeroRate, PendingNotYetIssued. Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-1445`. **Twenty tests pin**: **US person transferor not applicable**, **non-foreign affidavit furnished not applicable**, **publicly traded stock not applicable**, **domestically controlled REIT not applicable**, **buyer-residence under $300K zero-rate compliant**, **buyer-residence at exactly $300K zero-rate compliant** (statutory вүӨ reading), **buyer-residence $500K reduced 10 % compliant**, **buyer-residence at exactly $1M reduced 10 % compliant**, **buyer-residence above $1M full 15 % compliant** (residence affidavit does not eliminate withholding above ceiling), **default 15 % full rate compliant**, **buyer failed to withhold violation**, **buyer withheld less than required violation** (shortfall computed), **fraudulent residence affidavit violation** (В§ 1445(b)(6) exception unavailable), **Form 8288 late filing violation** (20-day deadline), **IRS withholding certificate zero-rate compliant**, **IRS withholding certificate reduced-rate compliant**, **citations pin В§ 1445 subsections and forms** ((a) + (b)(2) + (b)(4) + (b)(5) + (b)(6) + (c)(4) + PATH Act + Form 8288 + Form 8288-A + Form 8288-B), **constant pin rates and thresholds** (1500/1000/10000 basis points + $300K/$1M thresholds + 50 % use + 2 twelve-month periods + 20-day form deadline), **constant pin PATH Act 2016 effective year**, **saturating overflow defense extreme amount realized** (u64::MAX handled). Sibling cluster: `section_897` (FIRPTA gain recognition), `section_1031f` (related-party exchange + foreign person), `section_751` (partnership hot-asset distributions to foreign partners вҖ” В§ 1445(e)), `section_1411` (NIIT вҖ” trader-landlord overlap), `section_1235` (transfers of patent rights вҖ” withholding distinctions).

`traderview-expense::section_1411` is the **IRC В§ 1411 Net Investment Income Tax (NIIT) 3.8% surtax** module вҖ” trader-critical for any high-income trader (single MAGI > $200K; MFJ MAGI > $250K) paying 3.8% surtax on net investment income (interest + dividends + capital gains + passive rental income + royalties + non-qualified annuity income). В§ 469(c)(7) real estate professional carve-out carries through to В§ 1411 NIIT вҖ” trader-landlords who qualify (вүҘ 750 hours/year in real property trades AND > 50% of personal services) exclude rental income from NII. Distinct from siblings `section_469` (passive activity rules), `section_1256` (60/40 contract treatment), and `section_865` (sourcing of income).

**В§ 1411(a)(1) tax computation** вҖ” NIIT = 3.8% Г— LESSER of:
1. Net investment income (NII), OR
2. Excess of MAGI over applicable threshold

Pinned by `nii_less_than_magi_excess_uses_nii` (NII is the binding minimum), `magi_excess_less_than_nii_uses_magi_excess` (MAGI excess is the binding minimum), `nii_zero_no_niit_even_above_threshold` (zero NII вҶ’ zero tax even above threshold), `three_eight_percent_precision_at_round_amount` ($10M MAGI / $10M NII / $30M MAGI вҶ’ 3.8% Г— $10M = $380K NIIT cents), and `note_pins_3_8_percent_formula`.

**В§ 1411(b) MAGI thresholds (NOT indexed for inflation; same since 2013 ACA enactment)**:

| Filing status | Threshold | Source |
|---------------|-----------|--------|
| Single / Head of Household | **$200,000** | В§ 1411(b)(2) |
| Married Filing Jointly / Qualifying Surviving Spouse | **$250,000** | В§ 1411(b)(1) |
| Married Filing Separately | **$125,000** | В§ 1411(b)(3) |

Pinned by `single_at_200k_boundary_no_tax` (exactly $200K compliant), `single_below_200k_no_tax`, `single_over_200k_engages_niit`, `mfj_at_250k_boundary_no_tax`, `mfj_over_250k_engages_niit`, `mfs_at_125k_boundary_no_tax`, `mfs_over_125k_engages_niit`, `filing_status_threshold_truth_table` (5-cell sweep), `mfj_uniquely_highest_threshold_invariant` ($250K > $200K Single + $125K MFS), `mfs_uniquely_lowest_threshold_invariant` ($125K < all others), and `note_pins_thresholds` (NOT indexed).

**В§ 1411(c) net investment income categories**:
1. В§ 1411(c)(1)(A) interest
2. В§ 1411(c)(1)(A) dividends
3. В§ 1411(c)(1)(A) capital gains
4. В§ 1411(c)(1)(A) passive rental income
5. В§ 1411(c)(1)(A) royalty income
6. В§ 1411(c)(1)(A) non-qualified annuity income
7. В§ 1411(c)(1)(B) deductions allowed for investment expenses + state income tax
8. В§ 1411(c)(2) trade-or-business carve-out for material participation (excludes income from trade or business in which taxpayer materially participates, other than trading financial instruments / commodities)
9. В§ 1411(c)(5) qualified retirement plan distributions EXCLUDED

Pinned by `retirement_distributions_always_excluded` (В§ 1411(c)(5) qualified retirement distributions excluded regardless of REP status) and `note_pins_categories`.

**В§ 469(c)(7) real estate professional carve-out** вҖ” if taxpayer (a) performs вүҘ 750 hours per year in real property trades or businesses AND (b) more than HALF of personal services in real property trades, rental income may be treated as ACTIVE and excluded from NII. Pinned by `real_estate_professional_excludes_rental_from_nii`, `non_real_estate_professional_keeps_rental_in_nii`, `rental_carve_out_capped_at_nii` (cannot exceed total NII), `rep_uniquely_excludes_rental_invariant`, `rep_and_retirement_both_excluded_compounding` (REP rental + В§ 1411(c)(5) retirement compounded exclusions), and `note_pins_real_estate_professional_469c7`.

**One Big Beautiful Bill Act 2025 (OBBBA, Pub. L. 119-21) preserves В§ 1411** вҖ” did NOT repeal, amend, or modify; 3.8% rate + thresholds + categories + retirement-plan exception all remain identical to 2013 form. Pinned by `note_pins_obbba_2025_unchanged`.

**Defensive arithmetic** вҖ” negative MAGI / NII / rental clamped via `.max(0)`; saturating multiplication for 3.8% computation prevents overflow even at i64::MAX. Pinned by `defensive_negative_magi_clamped`, `defensive_negative_nii_clamped`, `defensive_negative_rental_clamped`, and `defensive_overflow_saturating`.

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-1411`. Thirty tests pin: **single below $200K no tax**; **single at $200K boundary no tax**; **single over $200K engages NIIT**; **MFJ at $250K boundary no tax**; **MFJ over $250K engages NIIT**; **MFS at $125K boundary no tax**; **MFS over $125K engages NIIT**; **NII less than MAGI excess uses NII**; **MAGI excess less than NII uses MAGI excess**; **real estate professional excludes rental from NII**; **non-REP keeps rental in NII**; **retirement distributions always excluded**; **citation pins all subsections** (a)(1) + (b)(1)-(3) + (c)(1)(A)-(B) + (c)(2) + (c)(5) + Form 8960 + В§ 469(c)(7) + Pub. L. 119-21; **note pins 3.8% formula**; **note pins thresholds** ($200K + $250K + $125K + NOT indexed); **note pins categories**; **note pins REP В§ 469(c)(7)** (750 hours + half + ACTIVE); **note pins OBBBA 2025 unchanged**; **filing status threshold truth table** (5-cell sweep); **defensive negative MAGI clamped**; **defensive negative NII clamped**; **defensive negative rental clamped**; **defensive overflow saturating** (i64::MAX); **rental carve-out capped at NII**; **REP uniquely excludes rental invariant**; **MFJ uniquely highest threshold invariant**; **MFS uniquely lowest threshold invariant**; **3.8% precision at round amount**; **REP and retirement both excluded compounding**; **NII zero no NIIT even above threshold**.

`traderview-expense::section_7345` is the **IRC В§ 7345 passport revocation for seriously delinquent tax debt module** вҖ” added by Section 32101 of the Fixing America's Surface Transportation (FAST) Act, Pub. L. 114-94 (December 4, 2015). Trader-critical for high-net-worth individuals with international travel needs and unresolved IRS tax issues. IRS certifies "seriously delinquent tax debt" (Notice CP508C) to the State Department, which then denies passport applications, revokes existing passports, or limits passport use. Sibling to the disclosure + penalty cluster: В§ 6011 (taxpayer disclosure), В§ 6651 (failure-to-file/pay penalties вҖ” source of much of the assessed amount), В§ 6654 (failure-to-pay-estimated-tax), В§ 6662 (accuracy penalty), В§ 6707A (taxpayer disclosure penalty). В§ 7345 is the COLLECTION pressure layer вҖ” operates after underlying tax liability has been assessed and collection action has begun.

**В§ 7345(b)(1) "Seriously delinquent tax debt" вҖ” three required conditions**:

| Condition | Authority | Rule |
|-----------|-----------|------|
| (i) Threshold | В§ 7345(b)(1) | Unpaid federal tax liability (including penalties + interest) > inflation-adjusted threshold ($66,000 for 2025; $50,000 originally in 2015) |
| (ii) Collection action | В§ 7345(b)(1)(A) or (B) | EITHER (A) notice of federal tax lien under В§ 6323 filed AND В§ 6320 administrative remedies exhausted, OR (B) levy issued under В§ 6331 |
| (iii) No exclusion | В§ 7345(b)(2) | None of the eight В§ 7345(b)(2)(A)-(H) exclusions engaged |

All three required. Pinned by `baseline_seriously_delinquent_certification_engaged`, `debt_below_threshold_no_certification`, `debt_at_threshold_exactly_not_exceeding` (statute reads "exceeds", not вүҘ), `debt_one_cent_above_threshold_engages`, `no_lien_no_levy_no_engagement`, and `all_three_engagement_conditions_required_truth_table` (8-cell truth table вҖ” only the (above_threshold=true, collection=true, exclusion=false) cell engages).

**Collection action prong вҖ” lien-with-exhausted-remedies OR levy alone**. Notice of federal tax lien filed under В§ 6323 is necessary but NOT sufficient вҖ” В§ 6320 administrative remedies must also be exhausted or lapsed. Alternatively, levy issued under В§ 6331 alone satisfies the prong. Pinned by `lien_without_exhausted_remedies_no_engagement` (lien alone without administrative exhaustion does not engage) and `levy_alone_satisfies_collection_action` (no lien needed if levy issued).

**В§ 7345(b)(2) eight statutory exclusions вҖ” each independently blocks certification**:

| Exclusion | Authority | Trigger |
|-----------|-----------|---------|
| (A) | В§ 6159 | Installment agreement being timely paid |
| (B) | В§ 7122 | Offer in compromise accepted by IRS |
| (C) | В§ 6015 | Innocent spouse relief request pending |
| (D) | В§ 6320 / В§ 6330 | Collection due process hearing pending |
| (E) | n/a | Pending bankruptcy proceeding |
| (F) | n/a | IRS-identified identity theft victim |
| (G) | n/a | Federally declared disaster area |
| (H) | n/a | "Currently not collectible" status due to financial hardship |

Pinned by individual exclusion-blocks tests for all eight prongs plus `each_exclusion_independently_blocks_certification_invariant` (8-prong sweep вҖ” each exclusion independently disqualifies) and `multiple_exclusions_listed_individually` (multiple exclusions surface separately in result struct).

**В§ 7345(c) reversal mechanics** вҖ” IRS notifies State Department within 30 days of any event resolving the debt (full payment, settlement, exclusion engagement, certification found erroneous). Notice CP508R issued to taxpayer. Reversal notification window pinned via `REVERSAL_NOTIFICATION_DAYS = 30` constant.

**Threshold inflation adjustment** вҖ” module accepts a parameterized `annual_threshold_cents` to support any tax year. 2025 constant is $66,000 = 6,600,000 cents; 2015 original was $50,000 = 5,000,000 cents. Pinned by `threshold_constants_invariant` (2025 > 2015; 30-day reversal window) and `parameterized_threshold_2024_value` (2024 threshold = $62K, confirms parameterization works).

**В§ 7345(e) judicial review** вҖ” taxpayer may seek review in U.S. Tax Court OR U.S. District Court for the district where the taxpayer resides. Citation includes this authority for users contesting certification.

**Sibling cluster note** вҖ” every result references the disclosure + penalty siblings (В§ 6011, В§ 6651, В§ 6654, В§ 6662, В§ 6707A) and identifies В§ 7345 as the COLLECTION pressure layer that engages after assessment + collection action. FAST Act В§ 32101 origin cited. Pinned by `sibling_modules_note_present` (UX-text regression for 5-statute cluster + FAST Act origin).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-7345`. Twenty-five tests pin: **baseline seriously delinquent certification engaged**; **debt below threshold no certification**; **debt at threshold exactly not exceeding** (statute reads "exceeds"); **debt one cent above threshold engages**; **lien without exhausted remedies no engagement**; **levy alone satisfies collection action**; **no lien no levy no engagement**; eight individual exclusion-blocks tests (installment agreement, OIC, innocent spouse, CDP, bankruptcy, identity theft, disaster area, CNC); **multiple exclusions listed individually** (3 simultaneous exclusions); **all three engagement conditions required truth table** (8-cell sweep); **each exclusion independently blocks certification invariant** (8-prong sweep); **threshold constants invariant** ($66K 2025 > $50K 2015; 30-day reversal); **parameterized threshold 2024 value** ($62K вҖ” confirms inflation-adjustment parameterization); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 7345 + В§ 7345(b)(1) + В§ 7345(b)(1)(A)/(B) + В§ 7345(b)(2) + В§ 7345(c)/(d)/(e) + FAST Act В§ 32101 + December 4, 2015 + В§ 6159 + В§ 7122 + В§ 6015 + В§ 6320 + В§ 6330 + В§ 6323 + В§ 6331 + CP508C + CP508R); **sibling modules note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 6011 + В§ 6651 + В§ 6654 + В§ 6662 + В§ 6707A + FAST Act origin); **defensive negative debt no engagement**; **defensive negative threshold clamped to zero**; **zero debt no engagement**.

`traderview-expense::section_7623` is the **IRC В§ 7623 IRS Whistleblower Awards** module вҖ” spans the four-statute legislative lineage: 1867 original discretionary regime (В§ 7623(a)); Tax Relief and Health Care Act of 2006 В§ 406 (Pub. L. 109-432, December 20, 2006) MANDATORY 15-30% regime (В§ 7623(b)) + creation of IRS Whistleblower Office; Bipartisan Budget Act of 2018 В§ 41108 (Pub. L. 115-123) "collected proceeds" definition broadening to include criminal fines, civil forfeitures, and FBAR penalties (В§ 7623(c)); Taxpayer First Act of 2019 В§ 1405(a) (Pub. L. 116-25, July 1, 2019) anti-retaliation protections with double back pay (В§ 7623(d)). Trader-critical because wealthy/sophisticated traders are precisely the IRS Whistleblower Office target taxpayer class вҖ” high gross income + complex tax positions (M2M В§ 475(f), В§ 1256 60/40, В§ 988 currency, В§ 1297 PFIC, В§ 6038D Form 8938, В§ 988 mark-to-market currency) make them disproportionately exposed to whistleblower tips from disgruntled fund employees, ex-spouses, business partners, or accountants. Companion to `section_6663` (civil fraud penalty), `section_7201` (tax evasion), `section_7202` (willful failure to collect), `section_7206` (perjury/false statements), `section_6701` (aiding/abetting penalty), `section_7430` (litigation costs), `section_6038d` (FATCA Form 8938), `section_6111`/`section_6112` (reportable transaction disclosure).

**В§ 7623(b)(5) mandatory award thresholds вҖ” two conjunctive gates**:

| Gate | Source | Threshold |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Amount in dispute | В§ 7623(b)(5)(A) | Tax + penalties + interest + additions to tax + additional amounts > **$2,000,000** |
| Individual gross income | В§ 7623(b)(5)(B) | If taxpayer is individual, gross income > **$200,000** for any taxable year at issue |

Pinned by `three_million_dispute_three_hundred_k_income_mandatory_tier`, `two_million_dispute_threshold_exactly_does_not_meet` (statute reads "exceed"), `two_million_one_cent_dispute_just_meets`, `individual_with_under_200k_gross_income_drops_to_discretionary`, and `corporate_taxpayer_skips_200k_gross_income_test` (entity-taxpayer carveout). Both gates conjunctive вҖ” failing either drops to В§ 7623(a) discretionary regime.

**В§ 7623(b) award tier ladder**:

| Tier | Source | Award Band |
|------|--------|------------|
| Mandatory full range | В§ 7623(b)(1) | **15-30%** of collected proceeds |
| Reduced вҖ” public information | В§ 7623(b)(2)(A) | Up to **10%** (news media, gov report, audit, hearing source) |
| Reduced вҖ” planned/initiated | В§ 7623(b)(2)(B) | Up to **30%** but reduced for planner/initiator role |
| Denied вҖ” criminal conviction | В§ 7623(b)(3) | **0% вҖ” no award shall be paid** |
| Discretionary only | В§ 7623(a) | Up to 15% (1867 original regime when В§ 7623(b)(5) thresholds unmet) |

Pinned by `award_22_percent_of_2_5m_proceeds_is_550k`, `award_15_percent_floor_on_mandatory_band`, `award_30_percent_ceiling_on_mandatory_band`, `public_information_caps_at_10_percent`, `public_information_request_exceeding_10_pct_fails`, `whistleblower_planned_or_initiated_reduced_tier`, `whistleblower_convicted_denies_award_entirely`, `convicted_overrides_planned_and_public_info` (precedence test), `clamping_below_min_band_locks_at_floor`, `award_tier_truth_table_five_cells`.

**В§ 7623(b)(4) Tax Court appeal вҖ” 30-day filing window** вҖ” any determination by IRS Whistleblower Office regarding award amount, denial, or reduction may be appealed to U.S. Tax Court within 30 days. Pinned by `tax_court_appeal_at_day_30_timely` and `tax_court_appeal_at_day_31_untimely`.

**В§ 7623(c) Bipartisan Budget Act of 2018 collected-proceeds breadth** вҖ” proceeds INCLUDE (1) penalties, interest, additions to tax, and additional amounts under internal revenue laws; AND (2) any proceeds arising from laws IRS is authorized to administer, enforce, or investigate, INCLUDING criminal fines, civil forfeitures, and violations of reporting requirements (FBAR penalties under 31 USC В§ 5321). Pinned by `note_pins_subsection_c_bba_2018_criminal_fines_civil_forfeitures`.

**В§ 7623(d) Taxpayer First Act of 2019 anti-retaliation** вҖ” no employer or officer/employee/contractor may discharge, demote, suspend, threaten, harass, or discriminate against whistleblower in terms of compensation, conditions, or privileges of employment because of any lawful protected disclosure to IRS, TIGTA, Comptroller General, DOJ, Congress, or supervisor. Remedies: reinstatement, **DOUBLE back pay with interest**, special damages including litigation costs, expert witness fees, and reasonable attorney fees. Pinned by `retaliation_triggers_taxpayer_first_act_violation` and `note_pins_subsection_d_tfa_2019_anti_retaliation_double_back_pay`.

**Treas. Reg. В§ 301.7623-4 award computation framework** вҖ” starts at 15% baseline; IRS Whistleblower Office analyzes administrative claim file for increase to 22% or 30% based on factors including significance of information, extent of substantial contribution, whether whistleblower planned/initiated noncompliance. IRM 25.2.2 governs Whistleblower Office procedures. Form 211 = Application for Award for Original Information. Pinned by `note_pins_treas_reg_15_22_30_baseline`.

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-7623`. Thirty-two tests pin: **three million dollar dispute three hundred thousand dollar income mandatory tier**; **award 22 percent of 2.5M proceeds is $550K**; **award 15 percent floor on mandatory band**; **award 30 percent ceiling on mandatory band**; **two million dollar dispute threshold exactly does not meet** (statute reads "exceed"); **two million one cent dispute just meets** (1-cent boundary); **individual with under 200K gross income drops to discretionary**; **corporate taxpayer skips 200K gross income test** (entity carveout); **information not acted on drops to discretionary**; **public information caps at 10 percent**; **public information request exceeding 10 pct fails**; **whistleblower planned or initiated reduced tier**; **whistleblower convicted denies award entirely**; **convicted overrides planned and public info** (precedence test); **tax court appeal at day 30 timely**; **tax court appeal at day 31 untimely**; **retaliation triggers Taxpayer First Act violation**; **citation pins all authorities** (В§ 7623(a)-(d) + 2006 Tax Relief and Health Care Act В§ 406 + 2018 BBA В§ 41108 + 2019 TFA В§ 1405(a) + Treas. Reg. В§ 301.7623-1 to -4 + IRM 25.2.2 + Form 211 + 31 USC В§ 5321); **note pins subsection (a) 1867 origin**; **note pins subsection (b)(1) 15-to-30 percent**; **note pins subsection (b)(2)(A) 10 percent public info**; **note pins subsection (b)(2)(B) planned-initiated**; **note pins subsection (b)(3) conviction no award**; **note pins subsection (b)(4) 30-day Tax Court appeal**; **note pins subsection (b)(5) two-million two-hundred-K thresholds**; **note pins subsection (c) BBA 2018 criminal fines civil forfeitures FBAR**; **note pins subsection (d) TFA 2019 anti-retaliation double back pay**; **note pins 2006 Act origin Form 211**; **note pins Treas. Reg. 15/22/30 baseline**; **award tier truth table five cells** (5-cell sweep mandatory + public + planned + convicted + discretionary); **clamping below min band locks at floor**; **defensive overflow clamped with saturating mul**.

`traderview-expense::section_7405` is the **IRC В§ 7405 action for recovery of erroneous refunds** module вҖ” IRS-side reverse mechanism to `section_7422` (taxpayer-initiated refund suit). Trader-relevant when IRS issues refund (e.g., NOL carryback via В§ 475(f) MTM election) and later determines computation was erroneous, providing recovery pathway. Procedural-companion to `section_7421` (Anti-Injunction Act), `section_7422` (taxpayer-initiated refund вҖ” reverse direction), `section_7426` (third-party wrongful levy), `section_7429` (jeopardy review), `section_7430` (litigation costs), `section_7433` (civil damages for unauthorized collection), `section_6514` (refunds otherwise erroneous), and `section_6532` (refund-suit limitations).

**В§ 7405 two recovery pathways**:

| Pathway | Source | Scope |
|---------|--------|-------|
| В§ 7405(a) | В§ 6514-erroneous refunds | Refunds erroneous within meaning of В§ 6514 |
| В§ 7405(b) | Non-В§ 6514 erroneous refunds | Refunds erroneously made even if NOT В§ 6514 erroneous |

Pinned by `fully_compliant_2_year_action_maintainable`, `non_section_6514_recovery_action_maintainable`, `refund_type_truth_table` (2-cell sweep), `note_pins_section_7405a_b_recovery_paths`.

**В§ 7405(d) statute of limitations вҖ” 2-year standard vs 5-year fraud**:

| SOL trigger | Length | Source |
|-------------|--------|--------|
| Standard | **2 years (730 days)** from making of refund | В§ 7405(d) |
| Fraud or misrepresentation of material fact | **5 years (1,825 days)** from making of refund | В§ 7405(d) |

Pinned by `at_730_day_2_year_boundary_compliant` (exactly 730 = compliant), `at_731_days_2_year_violates` (1-day precision boundary), `fraud_at_1825_day_boundary_compliant`, `fraud_at_1826_days_violates`, `fraud_at_1000_days_compliant` (within 5-year window), `fraud_truth_table_extends_sol`, `fraud_uniquely_extends_sol_invariant` (1000 days fails without fraud; passes with fraud), `precise_1_day_boundary_distinguishes_2_year_vs_fraud` (731 days no-fraud fails; 731 days fraud passes), `at_730_day_2_year_boundary_with_fraud_engages_5_year_window`, `sol_satisfied_truth_table` (7-cell sweep), `standard_2_year_uniquely_lower_than_fraud_5_year_invariant`, and `note_pins_2_5_year_sol_framework`.

**IRS burden of proof (per IRM 5.17.4 + case law) вҖ” three elements**:
1. Refund was erroneous
2. Amount of the refund
3. Taxpayer received or benefited from erroneous refund

Pinned by `no_refund_proven_erroneous_violates`, `no_amount_established_violates`, `no_taxpayer_received_violates`, `all_burden_elements_failed_3_violations_stack` (3 simultaneous failures), `burden_of_proof_truth_table` (5-cell sweep вҖ” only all-3-true satisfies burden), and `note_pins_irs_burden_of_proof_three_elements`.

**Jurisdiction** вҖ” district court (concurrent with United States Court of Federal Claims under 28 USC В§ 1346(a)(1)). Pinned by `note_pins_jurisdiction_and_companion_section_7422`.

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-7405`. Twenty-five tests pin: **fully compliant 2-year action maintainable**; **at 730-day 2-year boundary compliant**; **at 731 days 2-year violates** (1-day precision); **fraud at 1,000 days compliant**; **fraud at 1,825-day boundary compliant**; **fraud at 1,826 days violates**; **non-В§ 6514 recovery action maintainable**; **no refund proven erroneous violates** (burden element 1); **no amount established violates** (burden element 2); **no taxpayer received violates** (burden element 3); **all burden elements failed 3 violations stack**; **citation pins all authorities** (В§ 7405(a)-(d) + В§ 6514 + IRM 5.17.4 + 28 USC В§ 1346(a)(1)); **note pins В§ 7405(a)+(b) recovery paths**; **note pins 2/5-year SOL framework**; **note pins IRS burden of proof three elements**; **note pins jurisdiction and companion В§ 7422**; **fraud truth table extends SOL** (2-cell); **fraud uniquely extends SOL invariant** (1,000 days fails without fraud; passes with); **refund type truth table** (2-cell); **burden of proof truth table** (5-cell sweep); **at 730-day 2-year boundary with fraud engages 5-year window**; **precise 1-day boundary distinguishes 2-year vs fraud**; **citations field includes IRM**; **SOL satisfied truth table** (7-cell sweep); **standard 2-year uniquely lower than fraud 5-year invariant**.

`traderview-expense::section_7408` is the **IRC В§ 7408 injunction-remedy module** вҖ” completes the preparer-and-promoter enforcement cluster (В§ 6694 + В§ 6695 + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701 + В§ 7408). В§ 7408 is the EQUITABLE INJUNCTION authority IRS uses to STOP ongoing promoter/aider conduct, distinct from the civil penalty assessments under В§ 6700/В§ 6701. В§ 7408 supplements (does not replace) the penalty sections; IRS may pursue penalties and injunction in parallel under В§ 7402(a) independent-jurisdiction rule.

**В§ 7408(b) two-prong injunction test** вҖ” court may issue injunction when BOTH satisfied:

| Prong | Statute | Test |
|-------|---------|------|
| (1) | В§ 7408(b)(1) | Person engaged in specified conduct (any of 5 enumerated categories) |
| (2) | В§ 7408(b)(2) | Injunctive relief appropriate to PREVENT RECURRENCE |

Plus В§ 7408(a) Secretary-request requirement.

**В§ 7408(c) five specified-conduct categories**:

| Category | Statute |
|----------|---------|
| В§ 6700 abusive tax shelter promotion | В§ 7408(c) |
| В§ 6701 aiding and abetting understatement | В§ 7408(c) |
| В§ 6707 material advisor failure-to-furnish | В§ 7408(c) |
| В§ 6708 material advisor list-maintenance failure | В§ 7408(c) |
| Circular 230 violation | 31 U.S.C. В§ 330 regulations |

**В§ 7408(d) venue** вҖ” district court for the district where person resides, has principal place of business, or has engaged in specified conduct.

**В§ 7408(e) non-resident venue rule** вҖ” U.S. citizen/resident not residing in any U.S. judicial district treated as residing in DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA. Pinned by `non_resident_treated_as_dc_venue` and `resident_uses_normal_venue`.

**Three-element gating** вҖ” injunction requires (1) Secretary request, (2) specified conduct, (3) appropriateness to prevent recurrence. Missing any element defeats the action. Pinned by `no_secretary_request_no_injunction`, `no_specified_conduct_no_injunction`, `no_appropriateness_no_injunction`, and `all_three_elements_engages_injunction`.

**Five specified-conduct categories each independently engage** вҖ” В§ 6700, В§ 6701, В§ 6707, В§ 6708, Circular 230. Pinned by `section_6700_conduct_engages`, `section_6701_conduct_engages`, `section_6707_conduct_engages`, `section_6708_conduct_engages`, `circular_230_violation_engages`, `each_conduct_category_independently_engages_invariant` (5-prong sweep), and `all_five_categories_engaged` (combined).

**В§ 7402(a) supplemental jurisdiction** вҖ” В§ 7408 action proceeds SEPARATELY and APART from any other government action. Injunction does NOT preclude (1) civil penalty assessment under В§ 6700/В§ 6701/В§ 6707/В§ 6708, (2) criminal prosecution under В§ 7201/В§ 7203/В§ 7206 + 18 U.S.C. В§ 371 conspiracy, (3) Circular 230 disciplinary proceedings, or (4) other equitable remedies. В§ 7408 is SUPPLEMENTAL вҖ” IRS may pursue parallel tracks. Pinned by `supplemental_jurisdiction_note_present`.

**Multi-element truth table** вҖ” `three_required_elements_truth_table` (8-cell sweep over Secretary Г— conduct Г— appropriateness; only all-three-true engages); `each_conduct_category_independently_engages_invariant` (5-prong sweep вҖ” each specified conduct alone satisfies В§ 7408(b)(1)); `venue_dc_only_when_not_us_resident_invariant` (2-cell sweep).

**Sibling cluster note** вҖ” every result references the full preparer-and-promoter cluster (В§ 6694 + В§ 6695 + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701) plus material-advisor cluster (В§ 6707 + В§ 6708) plus В§ 7407 parallel preparer-specific injunction provision plus EQUITABLE REMEDY distinction from penalty assessments. Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present` (UX-text regression for full enforcement cluster + В§ 7407 parallel + equitable-remedy distinction).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-7408`. Twenty-two tests pin: **no Secretary request no injunction**; **no specified conduct no injunction**; **no appropriateness no injunction**; **all three elements engages injunction**; **В§ 6700 conduct engages**; **В§ 6701 conduct engages**; **В§ 6707 conduct engages**; **В§ 6708 conduct engages**; **Circular 230 violation engages**; **multiple categories listed individually** (3 simultaneous); **all five categories engaged**; **non-resident treated as DC venue** (В§ 7408(e)); **resident uses normal venue**; **three required elements truth table** (8-cell sweep вҖ” only all-three-true engages); **each conduct category independently engages invariant** (5-prong sweep); **venue DC only when not US resident invariant**; **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 7408 + (a)/(b)/(b)(1)/(b)(2)/(c)/(c)(1)-(5)/(d)/(e) + В§ 7402(a) + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701 + В§ 6707 + В§ 6708 + 31 U.S.C. В§ 330 + В§ 7407 + IRM 5.20.7 + IRM 5.20.8); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 6694 + В§ 6695 + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701 + В§ 6707 + В§ 6708 + В§ 7407 + EQUITABLE REMEDY distinction); **supplemental jurisdiction note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 7402(a) + parallel-track availability + criminal prosecution + Circular 230); **no Secretary request specific note**; **no conduct specific note**; **no appropriateness specific note**.

`traderview-expense::section_721` is the **IRC В§ 721 partnership contribution non-recognition module** вҖ” partnership-side counterpart to В§ 351 (corporate incorporation). Trader-critical for hedge fund formation, real estate JVs, fund-of-fund structures, and any partnership-based investment vehicle. В§ 721(a) provides BILATERAL non-recognition (both partnership and partners) on contribution of property in exchange for partnership interest вҖ” broader than В§ 351 which is one-way.

**Four-subsection structure**:

| Subsection | Rule | Trader-relevance |
|------------|------|------------------|
| В§ 721(a) | General non-recognition on contribution | Most common path |
| В§ 721(b) | **Investment company exception** вҖ” > 80% readily marketable stocks/securities triggers gain recognition | **Hedge fund formation trap** вҖ” prevents tax-free diversification |
| В§ 721(c) | **Related foreign partner gain recognition** (effective Jan 18, 2017) | Cross-border partnership formation |
| В§ 721(d) | Recapture rules tie-in with В§ 736(a) retiring partner distribution | End-of-life partnership transactions |

**В§ 721(a) general non-recognition вҖ” applies symmetrically to gain AND loss**. No recognition by partnership or partners. Built-in gain/loss deferred until partnership disposes of the property or partner disposes of partnership interest. В§ 704(c) governs eventual allocation upon disposition. Pinned by `baseline_section_721a_no_recognition`, `loss_property_no_recognition` (loss treated symmetrically), and `zero_basis_full_built_in_gain_no_recognition` ($100K gain still deferred).

**В§ 721(b) investment company exception вҖ” applies to GAIN only**. If partnership would be treated as investment company under В§ 351 (> 80% of partnership's assets held for investment AND consist of readily marketable stocks or securities), built-in gain is recognized immediately. Designed to prevent tax-free diversification of concentrated portfolios. Losses retain В§ 721(a) non-recognition treatment under В§ 721(b). Pinned by `investment_company_exception_engages_recognition` ($60K gain recognized) and `investment_company_loss_still_disallowed` (loss continues to be non-recognized).

**В§ 721(c) related foreign partner gain recognition вҖ” effective January 18, 2017**. Treas. Reg. В§ 1.721(c)-2 imposed gain recognition when (a) partnership formed on/after January 18, 2017 AND (b) related foreign person is a partner (under В§ 267(b) or В§ 707(b)(1)) AND (c) property has built-in gain (FMV > basis). Pinned by `section_721c_engages_post_2017_no_gdm`, `section_721c_pre_2017_no_recognition` (effective date grandfather), `section_721c_no_foreign_partner_no_recognition`, and `section_721c_loss_property_no_recognition` (gain-only application).

**В§ 1.721(c)-3 Gain Deferral Method (GDM) safe harbor**. If partnership adopts GDM, U.S. transferor defers built-in gain and recognizes it ratably over the property's recovery period via remedial income allocations. Acceleration events (reduction in U.S. transferor's interest, disposition of В§ 721(c) property) trigger remaining gain recognition. Pinned by `section_721c_gdm_defers_gain` (full $60K deferred under GDM) and `gdm_only_engages_with_section_721c_invariant` (GDM adoption meaningful only when В§ 721(c) engages).

**В§ 721(d) recapture вҖ” tied to В§ 736(a)**. When partnership interest is distributed in liquidation of a retiring partner under В§ 736(a), built-in gain inherent in the partnership interest may be recharacterized as ordinary income under recapture provisions. Pinned by `section_721d_recapture_note_present`.

**Multi-regime invariants** вҖ” `section_721a_applies_when_no_exception_engaged_invariant` (4-cell sweep вҖ” В§ 721(a) applies only when neither (b) nor (c) overrides); `gain_only_recognized_on_built_in_gain_property_invariant` (both В§ 721(b) and В§ 721(c) apply only to gain; losses retain В§ 721(a) treatment in both exception paths); `gdm_only_engages_with_section_721c_invariant` (GDM adoption meaningful only when В§ 721(c) engages); `realized_gain_loss_arithmetic_invariant` (4-cell FMV Г— basis sweep вҖ” gain, loss, no-gain-no-loss, zero-FMV-full-loss).

**Combined В§ 721(b) + В§ 721(c) engagement** вҖ” both exceptions may engage simultaneously when partnership is both investment company AND has related foreign partner formed post-2017. Module reports both for transparency (in practice IRS picks one). Pinned by `both_exceptions_engage_total_gain_aggregates`.

**Sibling partnership tax cluster note** вҖ” every result references В§ 351 (corporate-side counterpart вҖ” one-way vs. В§ 721's bilateral), В§ 704(c) (built-in gain allocation upon eventual disposition вҖ” companion module because deferred gain is tracked and allocated under В§ 704(c)), В§ 752 (partnership liabilities вҖ” partner's share affects outside basis), В§ 754 (basis adjustment election вҖ” inside-outside basis alignment), В§ 267(b) + В§ 707(b)(1) (related person definitions used by В§ 721(c)), and trader-relevance for hedge fund / real estate JV / fund-of-fund structures. Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present` (UX-text regression for full partnership cluster + trader-relevance).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-721`. Twenty-one tests pin: **baseline В§ 721(a) no recognition** ($60K built-in gain deferred); **loss property no recognition** (symmetric treatment under В§ 721(a)); **zero basis full built-in gain no recognition**; **investment company exception engages recognition** ($60K gain recognized under В§ 721(b)); **investment company loss still disallowed** (В§ 721(b) gain-only application); **В§ 721(c) engages post-2017 no GDM** ($60K gain recognized); **В§ 721(c) GDM defers gain** (full deferral under В§ 1.721(c)-3); **В§ 721(c) pre-2017 no recognition** (effective date grandfather); **В§ 721(c) no foreign partner no recognition**; **В§ 721(c) loss property no recognition** (gain-only); **both exceptions engage total gain aggregates** (transparency reporting); **В§ 721(a) applies when no exception engaged invariant** (4-cell sweep); **gain only recognized on built-in gain property invariant** (losses retain В§ 721(a) under both exception paths); **GDM only engages with В§ 721(c) invariant**; **realized gain/loss arithmetic invariant** (4-cell FMV Г— basis sweep); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 721 + (a)/(b)/(c)/(d) + В§ 1.721(c)-2 + В§ 1.721(c)-3 + В§ 1.351-1(c)(1) + В§ 351 + В§ 267(b) + В§ 707(b)(1) + В§ 704(c) + В§ 752 + В§ 754 + В§ 736 + Form 8865 + Jan 18, 2017); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 351 + В§ 704(c) + В§ 752 + В§ 754 + related-person + trader-relevance); **В§ 721(d) recapture note present** (В§ 736(a) tie-in); **defensive negative FMV clamped**; **defensive negative basis clamped**; **extreme amounts no overflow** ($1B FMV / $10M basis вҶ’ $990M gain via saturating math).

`traderview-expense::section_731` is the **IRC В§ 731 partnership distribution gain/loss recognition module** вҖ” direct sibling to `section_721` (contribution non-recognition, iter 264) вҖ” completes the partnership contribution/distribution cycle. Trader-critical for hedge fund redemptions, real estate JV exits, fund-of-fund distributions, and any partnership-based investment vehicle's exit math.

**Four-subsection structure**:

| Subsection | Rule | Application |
|------------|------|-------------|
| В§ 731(a)(1) | GAIN вҖ” only to extent money distributed exceeds partner's outside basis | Current AND liquidating distributions |
| В§ 731(a)(2) | LOSS вҖ” only on LIQUIDATING distribution when partner receives only money + В§ 751 hot assets + inventory | Liquidating only |
| В§ 731(b) | Partnership-level NO RECOGNITION on distribution | Always вҖ” partnership entity is non-event |
| В§ 731(c) | MARKETABLE SECURITIES treated as money for gain calculation | Default; В§ 731(c)(3) exceptions |

**В§ 731(a)(1) gain recognition** вҖ” money distributed exceeds partner's outside basis вҶ’ recognized as gain under В§ 741 (typically capital gain). Applies to both current and liquidating distributions. Pinned by `current_money_within_basis_no_gain`, `current_money_exceeds_basis_gain_recognized` ($150K money - $100K basis = $50K gain), `liquidating_money_exceeds_basis_gain_recognized`, `money_exactly_equals_basis_no_gain` (boundary), and `current_distribution_truth_table` (4-cell sweep over money Г— basis combinations).

**В§ 731(a)(2) loss recognition вҖ” strictest preconditions**. LIQUIDATING only AND partner receives nothing but money + В§ 751 hot assets + inventory. Receipt of ANY other property (real estate, equipment, intangibles) disables loss recognition entirely; built-in loss carries into basis of distributed property under В§ 732. Pinned by `current_distribution_no_loss_even_below_basis` (current distribution can never trigger loss), `liquidating_money_below_basis_loss_recognized` ($60K money + $100K basis вҶ’ $40K loss), `liquidating_other_property_received_no_loss` (other property disables loss), `liquidating_with_hot_assets_inventory_loss_reduced` (loss reduced by basis in hot assets + inventory: $100K - ($40K money + $20K hot + $10K inventory) = $30K loss), and `liquidating_total_received_exceeds_basis_no_loss` (when total exceeds basis, gain not loss).

**В§ 731(b) partnership-level non-recognition вҖ” always engaged**. No gain or loss recognized to the partnership entity on any distribution. Partnership distributions are non-events for the partnership; В§ 754 election + В§ 743(b) govern subsequent inside/outside basis interactions. Pinned by `partnership_level_no_recognition_always` (multi-scenario sweep) and `partnership_level_b_note_present` (UX-text regression for В§ 754 + В§ 743(b) cross-references).

**В§ 731(c) marketable securities вҖ” treated as money for gain calculation**. Designed to prevent partnerships from converting appreciated securities into partnership interests and then distributing the securities without gain recognition. В§ 731(c)(3) exceptions: (a) distribution by investment partnership; (b) contribution-rollover safe harbor (same securities contributed by same partner returned); (c) reduction-of-net-gain rule preserving partner's pro-rata share of unrealized gain. Treas. Reg. В§ 1.731-2 implementation. Pinned by `marketable_securities_treated_as_money_default`, `marketable_securities_exception_not_money` (В§ 731(c)(3) safe harbor), `cash_plus_marketable_securities_combined` ($50K cash + $80K securities = $130K money treated; $30K gain on $100K basis), and `section_731c_treated_as_money_only_when_no_exception_invariant` (2-cell sweep).

**Multi-regime invariants** вҖ” `gain_never_negative_invariant` (5-cell money sweep вҖ” gain always вүҘ 0 via saturating clamp); `loss_recognition_only_on_liquidating_invariant` (current vs liquidating with same low-basis path); `loss_recognition_disabled_by_other_property_invariant` (2-cell other-property sweep); `section_731c_treated_as_money_only_when_no_exception_invariant` (2-cell exception sweep); `current_distribution_truth_table` (4-cell money Г— basis combinations).

**Sibling partnership cluster note** вҖ” every result references В§ 721 (contribution non-recognition вҖ” iter 264 companion module), В§ 732 (basis of distributed property вҖ” when basis carries from inside vs outside), В§ 733 (reduction of partner's basis upon distribution), В§ 736 (retiring/deceased partner distributions вҖ” В§ 736(a) payments characterized as distributive share), В§ 751 (unrealized receivables + inventory вҖ” "hot assets" referenced in В§ 731(a)(2) loss path), В§ 754 (basis adjustment election), В§ 707(c) (guaranteed payments вҖ” distinct from В§ 731 distributions), and trader-relevance for hedge fund redemptions / real estate JV exits / fund-of-fund distributions. Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present` (UX-text regression for partnership cluster + trader-relevance).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-731`. Twenty-four tests pin: **current money within basis no gain**; **current money exceeds basis gain recognized** ($50K gain); **liquidating money exceeds basis gain recognized**; **money exactly equals basis no gain** (boundary); **current distribution no loss even below basis** (current never triggers loss); **liquidating money below basis loss recognized** ($40K loss); **liquidating other property received no loss** (other property disables loss + В§ 732 carryover note); **liquidating with hot assets + inventory loss reduced** ($30K reduced loss); **liquidating total received exceeds basis no loss** (gain not loss); **marketable securities treated as money default**; **marketable securities exception not money**; **cash plus marketable securities combined** ($130K combined вҶ’ $30K gain); **partnership-level no recognition always** (multi-scenario sweep); **gain never negative invariant** (5-cell sweep); **loss recognition only on liquidating invariant**; **loss recognition disabled by other property invariant** (2-cell sweep); **В§ 731(c) treated as money only when no exception invariant** (2-cell sweep); **current distribution truth table** (4-cell money Г— basis sweep); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 731 + (a)(1)/(a)(2)/(b)/(c)/(c)(3)/(d) + В§ 1.731-1 + В§ 1.731-2 + В§ 721 + В§ 732 + В§ 733 + В§ 736 + В§ 751 + В§ 754 + В§ 707(c)); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for partnership cluster + trader-relevance); **partnership-level (b) note present** (В§ 731(b) + В§ 754 + В§ 743(b) UX-text regression); **defensive negative basis clamped**; **defensive negative money clamped**; **extreme amounts no overflow** ($1B money / $10M basis вҶ’ $990M gain via saturating math).

`traderview-expense::section_752` is the **IRC В§ 752 partnership liabilities module** вҖ” completes the partnership-tax cluster after В§ 721 (contribution non-recognition, iter 264) and В§ 731 (distribution gain/loss, iter 266). В§ 752 is STRUCTURALLY CENTRAL to partnership taxation because partner's share of partnership liabilities is treated as MONEY CONTRIBUTED OR DISTRIBUTED for outside basis purposes вҖ” directly affects В§ 731 distribution gain/loss math and В§ 704(d) basis-limited loss deductions. Trader-critical for real estate partnerships with mortgage debt, hedge funds with margin debt, and any leveraged partnership structure.

**В§ 752(a)/(b) basis-flow rule**:

| Subsection | Trigger | Treatment | Effect |
|------------|---------|-----------|--------|
| В§ 752(a) | Partner's share of liabilities INCREASES | Deemed MONEY CONTRIBUTION | Outside basis вҶ‘ dollar-for-dollar |
| В§ 752(b) | Partner's share of liabilities DECREASES | Deemed MONEY DISTRIBUTION | Outside basis вҶ“; may trigger В§ 731(a)(1) gain |

В§ 752(c) вҖ” liability to which property is subject is treated as a partnership liability (and considered nonrecourse) to extent of property's FMV. Treas. Reg. В§ 1.752-1 NETTING RULE вҖ” single transaction with both increases and decreases collapses to net change.

**В§ 731(a)(1) gain interaction**. Deemed distribution under В§ 752(b) feeds В§ 731(a)(1) gain math; gain triggered when deemed distribution exceeds partner's outside basis. Trader-critical: refinancing or assumption events can trigger gain WITHOUT any actual cash distribution. Pinned by `liability_decrease_exceeds_basis_triggers_731_gain` ($100K decrease, $50K basis вҶ’ $50K В§ 731 gain), `liability_decrease_exactly_equals_basis_no_gain` (boundary), and `section_731_gain_only_when_distribution_exceeds_basis_invariant` (4-cell sweep).

**В§ 1.752-2 recourse allocation вҖ” economic risk of loss (EROL)**. Partner who bears EROL (constructive liquidation analysis) receives full share of the recourse liability. Final Regulations TD 10014 (December 2, 2024) clarified multi-partner risk-sharing, tiered partnerships, related-party rules. Pinned by `recourse_allocation_when_bears_erol`.

**В§ 1.752-3 nonrecourse three-tier allocation** (when no EROL):

| Tier | Source | Authority |
|------|--------|-----------|
| 1 | Partner's share of partnership minimum gain | В§ 704(b) + Treas. Reg. В§ 1.704-2 |
| 2 | В§ 704(c) gain on hypothetical disposition for full debt satisfaction | В§ 704(c) + Treas. Reg. В§ 1.704-3 |
| 3 | Excess nonrecourse liability вҖ” partner's share of partnership profits | Treas. Reg. В§ 1.752-3(a)(3) |

Pinned by `nonrecourse_tier1_only_minimum_gain`, `nonrecourse_tier2_only_704c_gain`, `nonrecourse_tier3_only_excess`, `nonrecourse_all_three_tiers_summed` ($5K + $3K + $2K = $10K), `nonrecourse_allocation_when_no_erol`, and `three_tier_nonrecourse_sum_invariant` (4-cell tier-combination sweep).

**Multi-regime invariants** вҖ” `liability_change_directly_translates_to_basis_change_invariant` (4-cell liability-change sweep with basis directly tracking Вұchange); `deemed_contribution_and_distribution_mutually_exclusive_invariant` (3-cell sweep вҖ” never both positive simultaneously); `section_731_gain_only_when_distribution_exceeds_basis_invariant` (4-cell basis Г— decrease sweep); `three_tier_nonrecourse_sum_invariant`; `single_transaction_netting_note_present` (Treas. Reg. В§ 1.752-1 netting rule UX regression).

**Sibling partnership cluster note** вҖ” every result references В§ 721 (contribution non-recognition вҖ” partner's initial outside basis), В§ 731 (distribution gain/loss вҖ” В§ 752(b) feeds В§ 731(a)(1) gain), В§ 704(b) (substantial economic effect вҖ” minimum gain framework for tier 1), В§ 704(c) (built-in gain allocation вҖ” tier 2), В§ 704(d) (basis-limited loss using В§ 752-adjusted basis), В§ 705 (partner basis adjustments aggregating В§ 752 + В§ 704 + distributions), and В§ 752 structural centrality вҖ” liability allocation feeds every other partnership computation. Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present`.

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-752`. Twenty-one tests pin: **liability increase treated as contribution** (basis +$50K); **liability zero change no deemed event**; **liability decrease treated as distribution within basis** ($170K new basis); **liability decrease exceeds basis triggers В§ 731 gain** ($50K gain on $50K basis with $100K decrease); **liability decrease exactly equals basis no gain** (boundary); **nonrecourse tier 1 only minimum gain**; **nonrecourse tier 2 only В§ 704(c) gain**; **nonrecourse tier 3 only excess**; **nonrecourse all three tiers summed**; **recourse allocation when bears EROL** (Treas. Reg. В§ 1.752-2); **nonrecourse allocation when no EROL** (3-tier note); **single transaction netting note present** (Treas. Reg. В§ 1.752-1); **liability change directly translates to basis change invariant** (4-cell sweep with $50K basis floor to avoid В§ 731 gain); **deemed contribution and distribution mutually exclusive invariant** (3-cell sweep); **В§ 731 gain only when distribution exceeds basis invariant** (4-cell basis Г— decrease sweep); **three-tier nonrecourse sum invariant** (4-cell tier combinations); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 752 + (a)/(b)/(c)/(d) + В§ 1.752-1/-2/-3 + В§ 1.704-2/-3 + TD 10014 + December 2, 2024 + В§ 721 + В§ 731 + В§ 704(b)/(c)/(d) + В§ 705); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for partnership cluster + В§ 752 structural centrality); **defensive negative basis clamped**; **defensive negative tier clamped**; **extreme amounts no overflow** ($1B liability вҶ’ $1B basis via saturating math).

`traderview-expense::section_6694` is the **IRC В§ 6694 tax return preparer penalty module** вҖ” direct preparer liability for understatements of taxpayer liability, layered on top of taxpayer-side penalties under В§ 6662 / В§ 6662A / В§ 6707A. Trader-critical because trader-CPAs commonly take aggressive positions on Schedule D, mark-to-market В§ 475(f) elections, wash-sale aggregation under В§ 1091, and partnership K-1 allocations. Sibling to the preparer + promoter penalty cluster: В§ 6695 (preparer information return penalties), В§ 6700 (promoter penalties), В§ 6701 (aiding and abetting understatement).

**В§ 6694 two-tier penalty structure**:

| Subsection | Trigger | Penalty | Reasonable cause exception |
|------------|---------|---------|----------------------------|
| В§ 6694(a) | Understatement due to unreasonable position | Greater of $1,000 OR 50% of preparer fee | В§ 6694(a)(3) вҖ” yes, if reasonable cause + good faith |
| В§ 6694(b) | Willful understatement OR reckless/intentional disregard | Greater of $5,000 OR 75% of preparer fee | None вҖ” no exception available |

**В§ 6694(a)(2) вҖ” three unreasonable-position paths** (any one engages):

| Prong | Statute | Trigger |
|-------|---------|---------|
| (A) | В§ 6694(a)(2)(A) | Position NOT disclosed + NO substantial authority |
| (B) | В§ 6694(a)(2)(B) | Position DISCLOSED + NO reasonable basis |
| (C) | В§ 6694(a)(2)(C) | Tax shelter / В§ 6662A reportable transaction + NOT more-likely-than-not |

Standards of authority (per Treasury regulations):
- **Substantial authority**: ~35-40% probability of sustaining the position
- **Reasonable basis**: вүҘ 20% probability (lower than substantial authority)
- **More likely than not**: > 50% probability (required for shelter/reportable cases)

Pinned by `three_unreasonable_position_paths_truth_table` (4-cell sweep вҖ” baseline + 3 paths), `undisclosed_with_substantial_authority_no_penalty`, `undisclosed_without_substantial_authority_penalty`, `disclosed_with_reasonable_basis_no_penalty`, `disclosed_without_reasonable_basis_penalty`, `tax_shelter_more_likely_than_not_no_penalty`, `tax_shelter_without_more_likely_than_not_penalty`, and `shelter_supersedes_substantial_authority_invariant` (even with substantial authority, shelter requires more-likely-than-not).

**В§ 6694(a)(3) reasonable-cause + good-faith exception**. No В§ 6694(a) penalty if it is shown that, considering all facts and circumstances, the understatement was due to reasonable cause AND the preparer acted in good faith. Note: this exception is NOT available for В§ 6694(b) penalties. Pinned by `reasonable_cause_excuses_6694a`.

**В§ 6694(a) penalty math** вҖ” greater of $1,000 floor OR 50% of preparer fee. Low-fee preparers hit the floor; high-fee preparers pay percentage. Pinned by `fee_based_50_percent_exceeds_minimum` ($10K fee вҶ’ $5K penalty) and `fee_based_50_percent_low_fee_floor_applies` ($500 fee Г— 50% = $250 < $1K floor вҶ’ floor wins).

**В§ 6694(b) willful or reckless conduct вҖ” no reasonable-cause exception**. Higher floor ($5,000) and higher percentage (75%). В§ 6694(b)(2)(A) вҖ” willful understatement; В§ 6694(b)(2)(B) вҖ” reckless or intentional disregard of rules/regulations. Pinned by `willful_understatement_engages_6694b`, `reckless_disregard_engages_6694b`, `no_understatement_no_6694b_even_if_willful` (must be an actual understatement), `fee_based_75_percent_exceeds_minimum` ($10K fee вҶ’ $7,500 penalty), and `fee_based_75_percent_low_fee_floor_applies` (floor $5K wins on $1K fee).

**В§ 6694(b)(3) no-stacking coordination**. When both (a) and (b) trigger, total penalty = max of the two (not sum). В§ 6694(b)(3) explicitly reduces (b) by any (a) already imposed on the same return. Pinned by `both_a_and_b_trigger_no_stacking` ($100K fee вҶ’ (a) = $50K, (b) = $75K, total = $75K), `only_a_no_stacking_total_equals_a`, and `only_b_no_stacking_total_equals_b`.

**Multi-regime invariants** вҖ” `b_penalty_strictly_higher_than_a_invariant` ($5K = 5Г— $1K floor; 75% = 1.5Г— 50%); `penalty_constants_invariant` (all four constants verified); `three_unreasonable_position_paths_truth_table` (4-cell exhaustive sweep over the three (a) paths plus baseline).

**Sibling cluster note** вҖ” every result references В§ 6695 (preparer info-return penalties), В§ 6700 (promoter penalties), В§ 6701 (aiding/abetting), В§ 6662 (taxpayer accuracy), В§ 6662A (reportable-transaction-understatement), В§ 6707A (disclosure failure), В§ 7701(a)(36) (preparer definition), plus trader-specific position categories (В§ 475(f), В§ 1091, partnership K-1). Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present` (UX-text regression for 7-statute cluster + trader-position references).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-6694`. Twenty-seven tests pin: **no understatement no penalty**; **undisclosed with substantial authority no penalty**; **undisclosed without substantial authority penalty**; **disclosed with reasonable basis no penalty**; **disclosed without reasonable basis penalty**; **tax shelter more-likely-than-not no penalty**; **tax shelter without more-likely-than-not penalty**; **reasonable cause excuses В§ 6694(a)**; **fee-based 50% exceeds minimum** ($5K on $10K fee); **fee-based 50% low fee floor applies** ($1K floor on $500 fee); **willful understatement engages В§ 6694(b)**; **reckless disregard engages В§ 6694(b)**; **no understatement no В§ 6694(b) even if willful**; **fee-based 75% exceeds minimum** ($7,500 on $10K fee); **fee-based 75% low fee floor applies** ($5K floor on $1K fee); **both (a) and (b) trigger no stacking** ($75K total on $100K fee); **only (a) no stacking total equals (a)**; **only (b) no stacking total equals (b)**; **(b) penalty strictly higher than (a) invariant** (5Г— floor; 1.5Г— percentage); **three unreasonable-position paths truth table** (4-cell sweep вҖ” baseline + 3 paths); **shelter supersedes substantial authority invariant**; **penalty constants invariant** ($1K / 50% / $5K / 75%); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 6694 + В§ 6694(a) + (a)(2)(A)/(B)/(C) + (a)(3) + (b) + (b)(2)(A)/(B) + (b)(3) + В§ 1.6694-1/-2/-3 + В§ 6662(d)(2)(B) + В§ 6662A + В§ 7701(a)(36)); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 6695 + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701 + В§ 6662 + В§ 6662A + В§ 6707A + В§ 475(f) + В§ 1091 trader positions); **defensive negative preparer fee clamped**; **zero fee floor still applies** (floor $1K wins on $0 fee); **defensive huge fee no overflow** ($100M fee вҶ’ $50M penalty via saturating math).

`traderview-expense::section_6695` is the **IRC В§ 6695 preparer information return penalties module** вҖ” direct sibling to `section_6694` (preparer substantive position penalty, iter 254). Where В§ 6694 punishes UNREASONABLE POSITIONS on the return, В§ 6695 punishes PROCEDURAL FAILURES by the preparer вҖ” failure to sign, failure to furnish copy to taxpayer, failure to retain records, failure to exercise due diligence on credit eligibility determinations. Together В§ 6694 + В§ 6695 cover both substantive and procedural sides of preparer liability. 2025 amounts per Rev. Proc. 2024-40 inflation adjustments.

**Per-failure penalties вҖ” $60 each (2025), max $31,500/year per subsection**:

| Subsection | Failure |
|------------|---------|
| В§ 6695(a) | Failure to furnish copy of return or claim to taxpayer |
| В§ 6695(b) | Failure to sign return or claim |
| В§ 6695(c) | Failure to furnish PTIN identifying number |
| В§ 6695(d) | Failure to retain copy or list (3-year retention) |
| В§ 6695(e) | Failure to file correct information returns (Forms 1099 series for preparer payments) |

**Higher-tier per-failure penalties вҖ” $635 each (2025)**:

| Subsection | Failure |
|------------|---------|
| В§ 6695(f) | Negotiation/endorsement of refund check by preparer (no annual cap) |
| В§ 6695(g) | Failure to exercise due diligence on EITC / CTC-ACTC-ODC / AOTC / HOH (4 independent categories; max combined per return = $2,540) |

**В§ 6695(g) due diligence вҖ” Treas. Reg. В§ 1.6695-2(b) requires**:
1. Complete and submit **Form 8867** (Paid Preparer's Earned Income Credit Checklist);
2. Compute credit using applicable worksheet;
3. Knowledge requirement вҖ” preparer cannot know or have reason to know information is incorrect;
4. Retain records for **3 years**.

**В§ 6695(g) four-category multiplier** вҖ” single return claiming all four (EITC + CTC + AOTC + HOH) generates up to $2,540 in due diligence penalties. Pinned by `all_four_categories_on_same_return_2540_max` (1 + 1 + 1 + 1 failures = $2,540), `single_eitc_due_diligence_failure_635`, `ctc_failure_only_engages_g`, `aotc_failure_only_engages_g`, and `hoh_failure_only_engages_g`.

**Per-failure penalties (a)-(e)** вҖ” $60 each up to annual cap of $31,500 per subsection. 525 failures Г— $60 = $31,500 exactly (cap-boundary); 1,000 failures Г— $60 = $60,000 вҶ’ capped at $31,500. Each subsection caps INDEPENDENTLY. Pinned by `single_a_failure_60_dollars` through `single_e_failure_60_dollars` (5 subsection tests), `cap_525_a_failures_at_31500` (exact-cap boundary), `cap_1000_a_failures_at_max` (over-cap clamps), and `each_subsection_caps_independently` (3 Г— $31,500 = $94,500 across three subsections).

**В§ 6695(f) refund check negotiation вҖ” no annual cap**. Unlike the per-failure subsections, the refund-check-negotiation penalty has no maximum cap. 100 refund checks negotiated Г— $635 = $63,500 (no clamping). Pinned by `single_refund_check_negotiation_635_dollars` and `refund_check_no_annual_cap`.

**Parameterized amounts for non-2025 years** вҖ” module accepts `per_failure_penalty_cents`, `annual_max_cap_cents`, and `higher_tier_penalty_cents` inputs to support any tax year. Pinned by `parameterized_2024_amounts` ($60/$30,000 2024) and `parameterized_2024_higher_tier` ($600 2024).

**Multi-regime invariants** вҖ” `higher_tier_exceeds_per_failure_invariant` ($635 = ~10Г— $60); `section_6695g_max_equals_4x_higher_tier_invariant` ($2,540 = 4 Г— $635); `five_per_failure_subsections_truth_table` (each of (a)-(e) generates $60 on single failure); `constants_2025_invariant` ($60 / $31,500 / $635 / $2,540 all verified).

**Sibling cluster note** вҖ” every result references В§ 6694 (preparer substantive position), В§ 6700 (promoter penalties), В§ 6701 (aiding and abetting), and taxpayer-side companions В§ 6662 + В§ 6662A + В§ 6707A. Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present` (UX-text regression for 7-statute cluster + Form 8867).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-6695`. Twenty-eight tests pin: **no failures no penalty**; **single (a)/(b)/(c)/(d)/(e) failure $60** (5 subsection tests); **525 (a) failures at exact $31,500 cap**; **1000 (a) failures cap at $31,500 max**; **each subsection caps independently** (3 Г— $31,500); **single refund check negotiation $635**; **refund check no annual cap** (100 Г— $635 = $63,500); **single EITC due diligence failure $635**; **all four (g) categories on same return $2,540 max**; **CTC failure only engages (g)**; **AOTC failure only engages (g)**; **HOH failure only engages (g)**; **combined penalty sums all subsections** ($60 + $120 + $635 + $635 = $1,450); **parameterized 2024 amounts** ($60/$30,000 2024); **parameterized 2024 higher tier** ($600 2024); **higher tier exceeds per failure invariant** (~10Г— ratio); **В§ 6695(g) max equals 4Г— higher tier invariant** ($2,540 = 4 Г— $635); **five per-failure subsections truth table** (each generates $60); **2025 constants invariant** ($60 / $31,500 / $635 / $2,540); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 6695 + (a)/(b)/(c)/(d)/(e)/(f)/(g) + В§ 1.6695-1/-2 + Form 8867 + Rev. Proc. 2024-40); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 6694 + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701 + В§ 6662 + В§ 6662A + В§ 6707A + Form 8867); **defensive negative counts clamped**; **defensive negative per-failure clamped**; **extreme count no overflow** (100K Г— $635 = $63.5M via saturating math).

`traderview-expense::section_6695a` is the **IRC В§ 6695A Substantial and Gross Valuation Misstatements Attributable to Incorrect Appraisals** module вҖ” added by Pension Protection Act of 2006 В§ 1219 to penalize appraisers whose appraisals support substantial or gross valuation misstatements. Trader-relevant for traders engaging in art donations (В§ 170 charitable contribution), conservation easements (В§ 170(h)), facade easements, real estate exchanges (В§ 1031), partnership interest valuations, syndicated conservation easement deductions (В§ 6707A listed transaction crossover), and estate/gift tax valuations (В§В§ 2031, 2512). Companion to `section_6662` substantial valuation misstatement (e); estate/gift valuation understatement (g); gross valuation misstatement (h); В§ 170(f)(11) qualified appraisal requirements; `section_6707A` reportable transaction penalty; Circular 230 В§ 10.50 appraiser conduct.

**В§ 6695A(a) Imposition of penalty** вҖ” penalty imposed when (1) person prepares appraisal AND (2) **KNEW OR REASONABLY SHOULD HAVE KNOWN** the appraisal would be used in connection with a return or claim for refund AND (3) claimed value results in: **В§ 6662(e) substantial valuation misstatement** (claimed value вүҘ 150% of correct amount); OR **В§ 6662(g) substantial estate/gift tax valuation understatement** (reported value вүӨ 65% of correct amount); OR **В§ 6662(h) gross valuation misstatement** (claimed value вүҘ 200% of correct amount).

**В§ 6695A(b) Amount of penalty** вҖ” penalty equals **LESSER OF**: (1) the GREATER of (a) **10% of underpayment** attributable to misstatement OR (b) **$1,000**; AND (2) **125% of gross income received** by such person from the preparation of the appraisal.

**В§ 6695A(c) Good-faith exception** вҖ” no penalty shall be imposed if person establishes to the satisfaction of the Secretary that the value established in the appraisal was **MORE LIKELY THAN NOT** (51% confidence standard) the proper value.

**Effective dates** вҖ” general rule applies to appraisals on returns filed **AFTER AUGUST 17, 2006** (Pension Protection Act В§ 1219 enactment date); **facade easement special rule** applies to returns filed **AFTER JULY 25, 2006**.

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-6695a`. Twenty-seven tests pin: **substantial valuation misstatement engages penalty**; **no misstatement no penalty**; **estate gift understatement engages penalty** (В§ 6662(g)); **gross valuation misstatement engages penalty** (В§ 6662(h)); **good faith more-likely-than-not exception blocks penalty** (В§ 6695A(c)); **appraiser no knowledge no penalty** (В§ 6695A(a)(2) KNOWN OR REASONABLY SHOULD HAVE KNOWN); **return filed before Aug 17 2006 no penalty**; **facade easement uses July 25 2006 effective date** (special rule); **facade easement before July 25 2006 no penalty**; **10% underpayment greater than $1,000 used**; **$1,000 floor when underpayment low**; **income cap 125% caps penalty**; **citation pins all authorities** (В§ 6695A(a)-(c) + Pension Protection Act В§ 1219 + 26 CFR В§ 1.6695A + IRM 20.1.12 + В§ 6662(e) + В§ 6662(g) + В§ 6662(h) + В§ 170(f)(11) + В§ 6707A + Circular 230 В§ 10.50); **note pins three misstatement categories**; **note pins penalty formula LESSER OF** (10% + $1,000 + 125%); **note pins good faith MORE LIKELY THAN NOT exception** (51%); **note pins substantial misstatement 150% threshold**; **note pins gross misstatement 200% threshold + 40% penalty doubling**; **note pins estate/gift 65% threshold**; **note pins August 17 2006 + July 25 2006 effective dates**; **note pins trader-relevant applications** (art + conservation easements + facade easements + В§ 1031 + syndicated); **misstatement category truth table 4 cells** (3 engage + None); **facade easement uses unique effective date invariant**; **good faith exception dominates invariant**; **penalty amount LESSER OF logic invariant** (income cap dominates when income low); **defensive zero underpayment uses $1,000 floor**; **defensive max u64 income saturating**.

`traderview-expense::section_6700` is the **IRC В§ 6700 promoter penalty module вҖ” abusive tax shelter promotion**. Third member of the preparer + promoter penalty cluster after В§ 6694 (preparer substantive position, iter 254) and В§ 6695 (preparer procedural failures, iter 256). В§ 6700 targets the PROMOTER side вҖ” the organizer/seller of abusive tax shelter plans, not the preparer of the underlying return. Effective since January 1, 1990; substantially amended by the American Jobs Creation Act of 2004 (AJCA), Pub. L. 108-357 В§ 818, which raised the false-statement penalty from $1,000 to 50% of gross income.

**В§ 6700(a) two-prong liability structure**:

| Prong | Statute | Element |
|-------|---------|---------|
| 1 | В§ 6700(a)(1) | Person organizes, assists in organizing, or participates in the sale of an interest in a partnership, investment plan, arrangement, or other entity |
| 2(A) | В§ 6700(a)(2)(A) | Makes or furnishes a false or fraudulent statement about any material matter |
| 2(B) | В§ 6700(a)(2)(B) | Makes or furnishes a gross valuation overstatement |

Both Prong 1 AND one of Prong 2 must engage for penalty to attach. Penalty applies REGARDLESS of (a) participant reliance or (b) actual underreporting by participant вҖ” В§ 6700 punishes the conduct of promotion itself.

**В§ 6700(a)(2)(A) false/fraudulent statement вҖ” 50% gross income penalty**. Requires SCIENTER (promoter knew or had reason to know statement was false). Penalty = 50% Г— gross income derived from the activity (no cap). Pinned by `false_statement_with_scienter_50_percent_penalty` (50% Г— $1M = $500K), `false_statement_without_scienter_no_penalty` (no scienter вҶ’ no engagement), `false_statement_zero_gross_income_zero_penalty` (50% Г— 0 = 0 but still flagged as violation), and `scienter_required_for_false_statement_only_invariant` (multi-prong sweep).

**В§ 6700(b)(1) gross valuation overstatement вҖ” definition + penalty**. Defined as: stated value EXCEEDS 200 PERCENT of correct value, AND value is directly related to amount of any deduction or credit allowable to participant. Penalty = $1,000 per activity, OR (if promoter establishes that 100% Г— gross income is LESSER) 100% Г— gross income. Effectively a $1,000 cap for high-revenue promoters; reduced floor for low-revenue. No scienter requirement. Pinned by `valuation_at_exactly_200_percent_not_engaged` (statute reads "EXCEEDS"), `valuation_one_cent_above_200_percent_engaged` (single-cent precision), `valuation_300_percent_engages_with_1000_floor` ($1K floor applies when gross income > $1K), `valuation_overstatement_low_gross_income_reduces_penalty` ($500 gross income < $1K вҶ’ 100% Г— $500 = $500), `valuation_overstatement_no_direct_deduction_no_violation` (direct-relationship element required), and `valuation_threshold_boundary_truth_table` (5-cell sweep at 100/199.99/200/200.0001/500%).

**Penalty math вҖ” both prongs may stack**. В§ 6700(a) and В§ 6700(b) penalties are NOT mutually exclusive вҖ” both can apply to the same promotion activity if both false statement + scienter AND gross valuation overstatement + direct relationship are present. Total penalty = (a) + (b). Pinned by `both_prongs_penalties_sum` ($1M gross Г— 50% + $1K floor = $501K).

**Valuation overstatement ratio reporting** вҖ” result struct includes `valuation_overstatement_ratio_bps` for downstream display. Division-by-zero protection: if correct value is 0 but stated value > 0, ratio reported as `i64::MAX`. Pinned by `valuation_ratio_in_bps_correctly_reported` ($25K stated / $10K correct = 250% = 25,000 bps) and `valuation_ratio_zero_correct_max`.

**Engagement-regardless principle** вҖ” В§ 6700 penalty applies regardless of (a) whether participant relied on the plan or (b) whether participant actually underreported tax. Promoter conduct is independently sanctionable. Pinned by `engagement_regardless_of_participant_reliance_note` (UX-text regression confirms note present in result).

**Multi-regime invariants** вҖ” `promoter_status_required_for_both_prongs_invariant` (Prong 1 organize/sell prerequisite for both (a) and (b) violations); `scienter_required_for_false_statement_only_invariant` (scienter element only on (a)(2)(A); (b)(1) doesn't require scienter); `valuation_threshold_boundary_truth_table` (5-cell precision sweep at 200% boundary); `penalty_constants_invariant` (50% / $1,000 / 200% constants).

**Sibling cluster note** вҖ” every result references the full preparer + promoter penalty cluster: В§ 6694 (preparer substantive position), В§ 6695 (preparer procedural failures), В§ 6701 (aiding and abetting understatement), В§ 6011 (taxpayer Form 8886), В§ 6662 (accuracy), В§ 6662A (reportable-transaction-understatement), В§ 6707A (taxpayer disclosure failure), and В§ 7408 (injunction remedy вҖ” operates as the principal enforcement arsenal alongside В§ 6700 + В§ 6701). Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present` (UX-text regression for 8-statute cluster).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-6700`. Twenty-four tests pin: **no promoter status no penalty**; **promoter status alone no penalty**; **false statement with scienter 50% penalty** ($500K on $1M gross); **false statement without scienter no penalty**; **false statement zero gross income zero penalty**; **valuation at exactly 200% not engaged** (statute reads "exceeds"); **valuation one cent above 200% engaged**; **valuation 300% engages with $1,000 floor**; **valuation overstatement low gross income reduces penalty** ($500 < $1K floor вҶ’ $500); **valuation overstatement no direct deduction no violation**; **both prongs penalties sum** ($500K + $1K); **valuation ratio in BPS correctly reported** (250% = 25,000 bps); **valuation ratio zero correct = MAX** (division-by-zero protection); **promoter status required for both prongs invariant**; **scienter required for false statement only invariant**; **valuation threshold boundary truth table** (5-cell sweep at 100/199.99/200/200.0001/500%); **penalty constants invariant** (50% / $1,000 / 200%); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 6700 + (a)(1) + (a)(2)(A) + (a)(2)(B) + (a) flush + (b)(1) + Pub. L. 108-357 В§ 818 + October 22, 2004 + Form 14242 + В§ 7408); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 6694 + В§ 6695 + В§ 6701 + В§ 6011 + В§ 6662 + В§ 6662A + В§ 6707A + В§ 7408); **defensive negative gross income clamped**; **defensive negative valuation clamped**; **defensive extreme gross income no overflow** ($1B Г— 50% = $500M via saturating math); **scienter note when statement made without knowledge**; **engagement regardless of participant reliance note** (UX-text regression).

`traderview-expense::section_6701` is the **IRC В§ 6701 aiding-and-abetting penalty module** вҖ” fourth and final member of the preparer + promoter penalty cluster after В§ 6694 (preparer substantive position, iter 254), В§ 6695 (preparer procedural failures, iter 256), and В§ 6700 (promoter penalties, iter 258). В§ 6701 captures the BROADEST range of conduct in the cluster вҖ” any person who aids, assists, procures, or advises with respect to preparation of a document they KNOW would result in another person's tax understatement, regardless of preparer or promoter status. Per IRS Chief Counsel Memorandum 201531015, penalties are assessed per-document (not per-affected-taxpayer), but the В§ 6701(b)(2) one-per-taxpayer-per-period rule limits geometric growth.

**В§ 6701(a) three-element test** (all required):

| Element | Statute | Test |
|---------|---------|------|
| (1) | В§ 6701(a)(1) | Person aids/assists/procures/advises with respect to preparation or presentation of any portion of a return, affidavit, claim, or other document |
| (2) | В§ 6701(a)(2) | Person knows or has reason to believe portion will be used in connection with any material matter arising under internal revenue laws |
| (3) | В§ 6701(a)(3) | Person knows portion (if so used) would result in understatement of liability for tax of ANOTHER person |

All three required. Pinned by `no_aid_no_engagement`, `aid_without_material_matter_knowledge_no_engagement`, `aid_without_understatement_knowledge_no_engagement`, and `three_element_truth_table` (8-cell exhaustive sweep вҖ” only the all-three-true cell engages).

**В§ 6701(b)(1) penalty rates**:

| Subsection | Taxpayer type | Per-document penalty |
|------------|---------------|----------------------|
| В§ 6701(b)(1)(A) | Non-corporate (individual, partnership, trust, estate) | $1,000 |
| В§ 6701(b)(1)(B) | **Corporate** | **$10,000** (10Г— non-corporate rate) |

Pinned by `all_three_elements_engages_non_corporate_1000`, `all_three_elements_engages_corporate_10000`, `corporate_rate_10x_noncorporate_invariant`, `corporate_taxpayer_uses_higher_rate`, and `non_corporate_uses_lower_rate`.

**В§ 6701(b)(2) one-per-taxpayer-per-period rule**. If a person is subject to a В§ 6701(a) penalty for any document relating to a particular taxpayer for a particular taxable period, that person shall NOT be subject to additional В§ 6701(a) penalties with respect to OTHER documents relating to the SAME taxpayer for the SAME period. Limits geometric penalty growth. Computed as `min(documents, distinct_taxpayers)` when all documents share the same period; spans of multiple periods bypass the cap. Pinned by `ten_documents_same_taxpayer_one_period_one_penalty` (10 docs вҶ’ 1 penalty), `ten_documents_ten_taxpayers_ten_penalties` (1:1 ratio вҶ’ 10 penalties Г— $1K = $10K), `ten_documents_ten_taxpayers_corporate_100k` (corporate Г— 10 Г— $10K = $100K), `five_documents_three_taxpayers_three_penalties` (min(5, 3) = 3), and `multi_period_documents_each_count` (multi-period bypasses cap).

**В§ 6701(f) coordination вҖ” В§ 6701 supersedes В§ 6694**. When В§ 6701(a) engages on a document, В§ 6694(a)/(b) preparer penalties may NOT be assessed on that same document. В§ 6701 is the BROADER and MORE SERIOUS liability (knowledge of understatement is required; vs. В§ 6694's unreasonable-position or willful/reckless conduct). Pinned by `supersedes_section_6694_when_engaged` and `does_not_supersede_when_not_engaged`.

**Multi-regime invariants** вҖ” `three_element_truth_table` (8-cell sweep вҖ” only `(true, true, true)` engages); `corporate_rate_10x_noncorporate_invariant` ($10K = 10 Г— $1K); `penalty_constants_invariant` ($1,000 / $10,000 confirmed).

**Sibling cluster note** вҖ” every result references the full 4-statute preparer + promoter cluster (В§ 6694 + В§ 6695 + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701), taxpayer-side companions (В§ 6011 + В§ 6662 + В§ 6662A + В§ 6707A), and В§ 7408 injunction remedy for В§ 6700 + В§ 6701 conduct. Pinned by `sibling_cluster_note_present` (UX-text regression for full cluster + В§ 6701-broadest-member note).

Mounted at `POST /api/calc/section-6701`. Twenty-four tests pin: **no aid no engagement**; **aid without material matter knowledge no engagement**; **aid without understatement knowledge no engagement**; **all three elements engages non-corporate $1,000**; **all three elements engages corporate $10,000**; **ten documents same taxpayer one period one penalty** (one-per-taxpayer rule); **ten documents ten taxpayers ten penalties** (1:1 ratio); **ten documents ten taxpayers corporate $100K**; **five documents three taxpayers three penalties** (min math); **multi-period documents each count** (bypasses one-per-taxpayer cap); **supersedes В§ 6694 when engaged** (В§ 6701(f)); **does not supersede when not engaged**; **corporate rate 10Г— non-corporate invariant**; **three-element truth table** (8-cell sweep вҖ” only all-three-true engages); **penalty constants invariant** ($1K / $10K); **citation pins all subsections** (В§ 6701 + (a)(1)/(a)(2)/(a)(3) + (b)(1)(A)/(b)(1)(B) + (b)(2) + (f) + В§ 6700 + В§ 7408 + IRM 20.1.6 + CCM 201531015); **sibling cluster note present** (UX-text regression for В§ 6694 + В§ 6695 + В§ 6700 + В§ 6701 + В§ 6011 + В§ 6662 + В§ 6662A + В§ 6707A + В§ 7408 + BROADEST member note); **defensive negative documents clamped**; **defensive negative taxpayers clamped to floor at one**; **extreme documents no overflow** (100K Г— $10K = $1B via saturating math); **no engagement no supersession**; **missing element specific notes** (three-element-specific note coverage).

`traderview-expense::section_6707` is the **IRC В§ 6707 material advisor failure to furnish information regarding reportable transactions module** вҖ” material-advisor SIDE civil penalty companion to `section_6111` (Form 8918 material-advisor disclosure obligation already shipped), `section_6112` (material-advisor list maintenance), `section_6707a` (TAXPAYER-side disclosure penalty), `section_6011` (Form 8886 taxpayer disclosure), `section_6662a` (reportable-transaction understatement accuracy penalty). Enacted by **American Jobs Creation Act of 2004 В§ 815** (Pub.
